FSElevate
Overview Buttons Cards Forms Badges Gamification
Elevate / Components / Forms
Component

Forms

Inputs for onboarding, lab submission, code review requests, and cohort settings.

Usage

Use form controls for clear data entry and configuration flows where learners need confidence before submitting.

  • Pair every input with a visible label.
  • Use hints for helpful context, not required-field noise.
  • Use segmented controls for compact, mutually exclusive choices.
Input stack Form controls
Used to personalize quests and review cadence. 
<div class="field">
  <label for="goal">Learning goal</label>
  <input class="input" id="goal" placeholder="Build production-ready fullstack apps">
  <span class="field-hint">Used to personalize quests and review cadence.</span>
</div>

<div class="field">
  <label for="track">Track</label>
  <select class="select" id="track">
    <option>Fullstack TypeScript</option>
  </select>
</div>
Choice controls Preferences 
<div class="segmented">
  <button class="segment is-active" type="button">Daily</button>
  <button class="segment" type="button">Weekends</button>
  <button class="segment" type="button">Custom</button>
</div>

<label class="check-row">
  <input type="checkbox" checked> Include streak reminders
</label>
